description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI Build that runs on push to master and on pull requests to master. The workflow has four jobs: build, linux-coverage, bindings, and conan. The build job uses a matrix strategy to run on multiple operating systems with different presets, and performs steps including checkout, dependency installation, configuration, build, and test. The linux-coverage, bindings, and conan jobs run on specific operating systems and perform similar steps including checkout, dependency installation, configuration, build, and test.
